rationale: The cited paper is referenced in a single discussion claim that customer-metric disclosures can reduce investor uncertainty and potentially raise firm value. It serves as supporting background for an implication, not as an input to the paper's core valuation model, estimation approach, hypotheses, or empirical tests. The citing paper's main methodological development and benchmark comparisons are built on other prior work, so this citation is a passing conceptual support rather than a substantive building block.
